titleStmt.title: SII 28.265: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 265. (A.R. No. 419 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, south wall.

Records that Chētarāyar granted 1000 kuḻi of wet-land out of his kāṇi which was his on account of his being kāḍuveṭṭi, for recitation of the vēdas (tiru-addhiayaṇam) by two brahmins for God Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, of Āṟagaḷūr with effect from the month of Puraṭṭādi of the year 13 and that the king on the quoted date granted exemption from the taxes payable in cash (kāśāyavargam) and any other levies that were till then being collected in respect of that land. Also contains a royal order to the nāṭṭār of the paṟṟu in between the rivers Vembaṟṟāṟu and Peṇṇāṟu intimating that the dēvadāṉam and tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands of the Gods of Āṟakaḷūr were exempted from all āyam (levies) including nāṭṭu-viṉiyōkam, kāṇikkai and sammātam. However, these levies should be collected and the proceeds utilised for celebrating a festival with the procession of the God, for the health of the king. The latter order became necessary as it was reported that the proceeds of the kāṇikkai-ppaṇam had been unauthorisedly appropriated.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— śrīkoccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu Āṟakaḷūr Uṭaiyār tirukāmicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Addhiayaṉam paṇṇa cetarāyar kaṭaikkaṭṭiṉa brāhmaṇar per Iruvarkku Ivvūrk kulacekaraṉ peri Eriyil Ivar kāṭuveṭṭik kāṇiyāṉa naṉceynaṉcey is written below the line.nilattile patimuṉṟāvatu puraṭṭāti mātam mutal Āyiram kuḻi po
ṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa kācāya vaṟkamum Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyiliyākatta written above the line.taṉtom Ivaddhiayaṉattukku Iṉṉilam caṉtirātittavarai celvatāka Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatu Ivai tirueḻuttu tulyam § Ivai kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu svastiśrī Aruḷicceyal vemparāṟṟukku vaṭakku peṇṇai Āṟṟukku teṟku Uḷppappa written toṅether.ṭṭa paṟṟil nāṭṭāṟku Āṟakaḷ
ḷūr nāyaṉmār tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku nāṭṭu viṉiokam kāṇikkai cammātam Uḷpaṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum tavittu Immutal Iṭṭu namakku naṉṟākat tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷippotac ceyvate kāṇikkaip paṇattukku vakuppiṭṭu taravu piṟittārkaḷḷāka keṭṭom Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavarkaḷḷalla Ivvolai kaṇṭapoḻute Ippaṟṟil piṟitta taravukaḷum tavirak kaḻittuk koṇṭatuṇṭākilum tiri
yak kuṭuppittu melum Ippaṭi Irukkumivai parikarikka Ivai tirueḻuttu tulvyam § Ivai vāṇātarāyar Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
